probeVectorIntersections.description: Nearest proper-name target by angular separation for each deterministic probe vector.
probeVectorIntersections.matching: maximum dot product between the probe unit vector and target unit vector from Sol
probeVectorIntersections.targets: HYG stars with proper names plus processed landmark points; Sol is excluded
